exampleSentences: Anh phải rời công ty sớm hôm nay để đón con.
Chị không muốn rời thành phố này vì nhiều kỷ niệm đẹp.
Em sẽ rời nhóm nếu không còn dự án nào phù hợp.
notes:
rời = to leave, to go away from a place, person, or position.

It’s used when someone moves away or separates from something: a place, a job, a group, or even physically from an object. You’ll often hear rời khỏi, rời đi, or rời xa for clearer meaning. It can also mean “detach” in physical situations (like something coming off).

Close synonym: rời khỏi (a bit fuller). Opposite idea: ở lại (stay), đến (arrive).

definitions.es: dejar o alejarse de un lugar.
definitions.vi: rời khỏi một nơi nào đó.
definitions.en: to leave or to move away from a place.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I have to leave the company early today to pick up my child.
I don't want to leave this city because of many beautiful memories.
I will leave the group if there are no suitable projects left.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ ___ khỏi đây ngay.

It’s used when someone moves away or separates from something: a place, a job, a group, or even physically from an object. You’ll often hear **rời khỏi**, **rời đi**, or **rời xa** for clearer meaning. It can also mean “detach” in physical situations (like something coming off).


Close synonym: **rời khỏi** (a bit fuller). Opposite idea: **ở lại** (stay), **đến** (arrive).
